raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"Open-ended opinion request on a research excerpt plausibly includes evaluating the thesis, gap statement, and contribution claim of ClarifySQL.","R1.2":"A general impression of a research artifact naturally covers whether the argument chain — ambiguity detection → clarification policy → benchmark results → production claim — holds together internally.","R1.3":"The artifact makes specific quantitative claims (73.4% accuracy, 6.1-pt improvement, 12% reduction, AmbigSQL v3 with 4,200 queries) whose grounding is a likely target of 'what do you think'; evidence-claim alignment is therefore central.","R1.4":"'What do you think?' on a research paper almost always foregrounds novelty: whether ClarifySQL constitutes a meaningful advance over prior text-to-SQL and ambiguity-handling work."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for a substantive technical critique — evaluating the research logic, evidence quality, and novelty claims — rather than feedback on the writing and presentation of the excerpt?"}

rationale.R1.1: Open-ended opinion request on a research excerpt plausibly includes evaluating the thesis, gap statement, and contribution claim of ClarifySQL.
rationale.R1.2: A general impression of a research artifact naturally covers whether the argument chain — ambiguity detection → clarification policy → benchmark results → production claim — holds together internally.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes specific quantitative claims (73.4% accuracy, 6.1-pt improvement, 12% reduction, AmbigSQL v3 with 4,200 queries) whose grounding is a likely target of 'what do you think'; evidence-claim alignment is therefore central.
rationale.R1.4: 'What do you think?' on a research paper almost always foregrounds novelty: whether ClarifySQL constitutes a meaningful advance over prior text-to-SQL and ambiguity-handling work.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a substantive technical critique — evaluating the research logic, evidence quality, and novelty claims — rather than feedback on the writing and presentation of the excerpt?
